THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASUCCI, ANTHONY HITCH, LAWRENCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 367 HAIGHT $3,375.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,375.00, LEASE FORFEITED, MONEY JDMT AS TO ANTHONY MASUCCI ONLY. IF HE PAYS $1700 BY 1-8-96, IT WILL BE DEEMED FULLY SATISFIED. IF DEFTS PAY AN ADD'L $1125 BY 5PM 12-21-95, PLTF WILL STAY EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION TO 1-31-96. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
